infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Chronaura uses the camera to overlay stars, planets, constellations, and alignment guides onto your real sky view.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Chronaura uses your location to calculate the sky, moon, planets, and visible events above you.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Chronaura saves sky captures and cosmic time-lapse exports only when you choose to save them.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Chronaura uses motion sensors to align the sky lens with the direction your phone is pointing.

plugins.cameraPermission: Chronaura uses the camera to overlay stars, planets, constellations, and alignment guides onto your real sky view.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Chronaura uses your location to calculate the sky, moon, planets, and visible events above you.

plugins.savePhotosPermission: Chronaura saves sky captures and cosmic time-lapse exports only when you choose to save them.

plugins.motionPermission: Chronaura uses motion sensors to align Sky Lens with the direction your phone is pointing.
